title: Basic Frite
description: A collection of mods based around the famous Create mod, improving the gaming experience with a wide variety of optimisations as well as useful and decorative additions!
body:
A collection of mods based around the famous "Create" mod, improving the gaming experience with a wide variety of optimisations as well as useful and decorative additions!

Here's a list of features:
1. Create mod
2. Various extension for Create
3. Decorations mods
4. Immersive Airplane for faste travels.
5. Wide variety of user and server optimization
6. An awesome online and offline map
